addApiKeyThenPickWhich: Add your API key, then pick which models appear in the composer's picker.
addContextNowSupportsGitlabToo: Add Context now supports GitLab too — auto-detected based on your current project.
addCustomInstructionsAllAgentsWorking: Add custom instructions for all agents working in this repo.
addCustomInstructionsSentAgentStart: Add custom instructions sent to the agent at the start of every new chat.
addCustomInstructionsSentAgentWhen: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click Review in the inspector.
addCustomInstructionsSentAgentWhen2: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Create PR button.
addCustomInstructionsSentAgentWhen3: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Fix errors button.
addCustomInstructionsSentAgentWhen4: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Resolve conflicts button.
addCustomInstructionsUsedWhenHelmor: Add custom instructions used when Helmor generates the first branch rename suggestion for a new chat.
addFolderAlreadyMachine: Add a folder already on this machine.
addOneExposeCommandLikeDev: Add one to expose a command — like a dev server, test runner, or background task.
addOpenaiCompatibleEndpointResponsesApi: Add an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Responses API only).
addPreferencesHereAgentWillTold: Add your preferences here. The agent will be told to prioritize these instructions over its default instructions.
addProviderByApiKeyOpenai: Add a provider by API key or OpenAI-compatible endpoint, saved to ~/.config/opencode.
addRegistryProviderByApiKey: Add a registry provider by API key, or an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Saved to ~/.config/mimocode.
addRegistryProviderByApiKey2: Add a registry provider by API key, or an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Saved to ~/.config/opencode.
addSetupScriptRepositorySettingsRun: Add a setup script in repository settings to run it here.
addThirdPartyAnthropicCompatibleModels: Add third-party Anthropic-compatible models. They run alongside Claude Code's official models.
addsComposerToggleOpensPromptAgent: Adds a composer toggle that opens your prompt in the agent's terminal UI instead of a chat session. Claude and Codex only.
agentsNowKeepResearchNotesOther: Agents now keep research notes and other scratch artifacts out of workspace Changes.
aiGeneratesCodeHelmorWhereOrchestrate: AI generates the code. Helmor is where you orchestrate, review, and ship it.
aiProposalFromSourceOpenReview: AI proposal from {source} — open to review
aiProposedTaskStartEngageDismiss: AI proposed this task — start to engage or dismiss.
allocatePermanentRemoteHelmorAiAddress: Allocate a permanent remote-*.helmor.ai address so you never have to re-scan.
appearanceSettingsNowLetCustomizeChat: Appearance settings now let you customize chat size, UI and code fonts, and pointer cursors.
askMakeChangesMentionFilesRun: Ask to make changes, @mention files, run /commands
autoCompactsOlderTurnsWhenWindow: Auto-compacts older turns when the window fills.
autoRunSetupScriptWorkspaceCreation: Auto-run setup script on workspace creation
automaticUpdateChecksWaitingUpdaterConfi: Automatic update checks are waiting for updater configuration.
availableFromSetupTabAnyWorkspace: Available from the Setup tab in any workspace
bootstrapDependenciesAfterWorkspaceCreat: Bootstrap dependencies after a workspace is created.
branchUpDateTargetNoUncommitted: Branch up to date with {target} · no uncommitted changes
browserIsnTConnectedHelmorDesktop: This browser isn’t connected to your Helmor desktop yet.
byDefaultContextUsageOnlyShown: By default, context usage is only shown when more than 70% is used.
byDefaultSetupRunsAutomaticallySoon: On by default — setup runs automatically as soon as a workspace is created. Turn off to run it manually from the Setup tab.
canNowBuildStackedPrsChain: You can now build stacked PRs — a chain of small, dependent PRs. Plan one with /helmor-cli stack, or split a change you've already written with /helmor-cli break; the sidebar groups each stack together.
canNowChooseSeparateFontEmbedded: You can now choose a separate font for embedded terminals.
canNowCleanUpAllArchived: You can now clean up all archived workspaces at once from Settings → General to free up disk space.
canNowDragWorkspacesSidebarKeep: You can now drag workspaces in the sidebar to keep each section in your preferred order.
canNowEditCodeRightFrom: You can now edit code right from the diff view.
canNowGroupWorkspacesSidebarBy: You can now group workspaces in the sidebar by repository — toggle it in Settings.
canNowHoldCtrlTabCycle: You can now hold Ctrl+Tab to cycle through recently used workspaces — release to switch, just like Cmd+Tab.
canNowReuseExistingBranchWhen: You can now reuse an existing branch when creating a workspace.
canNowTurnInspectorTerminalHover: You can now turn inspector terminal hover expansion on or off in Settings.
changeCursorPointerWhenHoveringOver: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over interactive elements
chatCurrentlyRunningClosingWillCancel: This chat is currently running. Closing it will cancel {agentLabel}.
checkOutPickedBranchDirectly: Check out the picked branch directly.
checkingGithubReleasesBackground: Checking GitHub releases in the background.
checksGithubReleasesDownloadsUpdatesQuie: Checks GitHub releases, downloads updates quietly, then prompts when ready.
chooseLeastOneOptionContinue: Choose at least one option to continue.
chooseLocalFolderImportFromGithub: Choose a local folder or import from GitHub to build your first queue.
chooseRepoTheseContextsSettingsApply: Choose the repo these Contexts settings apply to.
chooseSessionFromHeaderInspectIts: Choose a session from the header to inspect its timeline.
claudeCodeThinkingNowOffersTwo: Claude Code thinking now offers two modes. Choosing Omitted lets the final text stream sooner.
claudeFable51mContextNow: Claude Fable 5 (1M context) is now available at the top of the Claude Code model list — Anthropic's most capable model for the hardest, longest-running tasks. Opus 4.8 remains the default.
claudeOpus481mContext: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) is now the default model, listed above 4.7 and 4.6 in the picker.
claudeSDynamicWorkflowsNowAppear: Claude's dynamic workflows now appear as a live card, and the new /workflows command opens a keyboard-navigable drill-down into each run's phases, agents, and results.
claudeSessionsNowIncludeGoalCommand: Claude sessions now include the /goal command for setting a completion condition that Claude keeps working toward.
cleanedUpDeletedcountButFailurecountWork: Cleaned up {deletedCount}, but {failureCount} {workspaceLabel} could not be deleted
cloneRemoteProjectIntoHelmor: Clone a remote project into Helmor.
cmdShiftNNowOpensNew: Cmd+Shift+N now opens the new-workspace composer in Just-chat mode, and Cmd+N opens it in worktree mode.
codexGoalContinuationsNoLongerAsk: Codex /goal continuations no longer ask for approval.
codexSlashCommandsNowIncludeSkills: Codex slash commands now include skills from linked directories and the repository root.
codingAgentsHelmorCanNowDrive: Coding agents in Helmor can now drive Helmor itself — spawn sibling workspaces, dispatch ship actions, and read other agents' transcripts. Just ask them in any chat. Helmor CLI and skills install automatically in the background.
commandsRunWhenWorkspacesSetUp: Commands that run when workspaces are set up, run, or archived.
commitMergeConflictsCannotMerge: {name} has merge conflicts and cannot be merged yet.
commitMergeabilityCalculating: Mergeability is still being calculated. Please wait and try again.
commitReconnectAccountTryAgain: Reconnect your {provider} account and try again.
commitUnableOpenChatSession: Unable to open a chat session.
composerAutoCloseHelp: When enabled, action sessions will close automatically when finished.
composerFormMissingProperties: Form user-input request is missing properties.
composerFormNoSupportedFields: No supported fields were found in the form schema.
composerFormUnsupportedRequired: Form schema contains unsupported required fields.
composerMcpToolNeedsApproval: This MCP tool needs your approval before it can run.
composerSomethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
composerUseValueAtLeast: Use a value of at least {count}.
composerUseValueNoMore: Use a value of no more than {count}.
composerWillFallBackAuto: . The composer will fall back to Auto.
computerRunningHelmorOpen: On the computer running Helmor, open
configuringTheseScriptsUpgradesDevLoop: Configuring these scripts upgrades your dev loop.
connectBrowserHelmorDesktopSoCan: Connect this browser to your Helmor desktop so you can open your workspaces, sessions, and agents from here. Only continue if you started this pairing yourself.
connectsSignedSlackDesktopAppEverything: Connects to your signed-in Slack desktop app. Everything stays local and secure on your device.
controlHelmorFromTerminalCreateWorkspace: Control Helmor from your terminal: create workspaces, send prompts, inspect files, and script repeatable flows.
controlsHowClaudeCodeReturnsThinking: Controls how Claude Code returns thinking content.
couldnTFetchModelsErrorAdd: Couldn't fetch models ({error}). Add them manually instead.
countSlackWorkspaceConnectedOpenContext: {count} Slack workspace connected. Open the Context sidebar to browse your feed.
countSlackWorkspacesConnectedOpenContext: {count} Slack workspaces connected. Open the Context sidebar to browse your feed.
cursorNowSupportsPlanModeDrafts: Cursor now supports Plan mode — it drafts a read-only plan first, then lets you approve it or request changes before it touches your code.
defaultOrderingBeforeAnySidebarFilters: Default ordering before any sidebar filters are applied.
deleteAllWorkspacesSessionsMessagesRepos: Delete all workspaces, sessions, messages, and repositories from the development database. Filesystem artefacts (worktrees, paste-cache) will also be removed.
describeBugSuggestImprovementAskQuestion: Describe a bug, suggest an improvement, or ask a question.
describeWhatChangeThenClickRequest: Describe what to change, then click Request Changes
desktopNotificationsCanNowPlaySound: Desktop notifications can now play a sound — pick from 12 effects in Settings → General.
doOppositeOneMessage: to do the opposite for one message.
donTWorryWeOnlyRead: Don't worry — we only read your Conductor data to import it here. Your Conductor data won't be modified in any way.
downloadingUpdateBackground: Downloading an update in the background.
driveHelmorFromPhoneSBrowser: Drive Helmor from your phone's browser over a private link. Enabling starts a local server and a Cloudflare tunnel — no app to install.
eGWatchSlackIncidentsDms: e.g. • Watch Slack #incidents and DMs from my team lead • Surface every Slack message that @-mentions me • Skip bot notifications and weekly digests
eachEntryAppearsInspectorSRun: Each entry appears in the Inspector's Run dropdown.
eachRepoUsesOneAccountsAdd: Each repo uses one of your accounts. Add now or skip — existing logins are picked up automatically. All accounts live in your local gh/glab CLI.
eachRunScriptCanNowDeclare: Each run script can now declare an optional cleanup command that runs when you click Stop — handy for docker compose, supabase, or anything with external resources to tear down. A second Stop click force-kills if you don't want to wait.
eachWorkspaceIsolatedCopyCodebase: Each workspace is an isolated copy of your codebase.
enlargeInspectorTerminalsWhenCursorRests: Enlarge inspector terminals when the cursor rests over them.
enterApiKeysHereUseThird: Enter API keys here to use third-party models. They run alongside Claude Code's official models.
enterValidDateTime: Enter a valid date and time.
everyNewWorkspaceNowHasGitignored: Every new workspace now has a gitignored `.agent-contexts/` directory agents can use to share files across sessions without polluting diffs.
failedLoadCommandsClickRetry: Failed to load commands · click to retry
fasterAgainSwitchingWorkspacesNowSnappie: ⚡ Faster again — switching workspaces is now snappier and smoother.
feedbackFailedForkHelmor: Failed to fork helmor on GitHub.
feedbackFailedSendToAgent: Failed to send feedback to agent.
feedbackPickDefaultModelFirst: Pick a default model in Settings first.
feedbackUnableOpenFolderPicker: Unable to open the folder picker.
finishSettingUpHelmorMainWindow: Finish setting up Helmor in the main window first.
forkFreshBranchOffPickedBase: Fork a fresh branch off the picked base.
forkReadyChooseWhereCloneMachine: Fork ready. Choose where to clone it on your machine.
fourNewColorThemesNowAvailable: Four new color themes are now available — Aubergine, Hoth, Choco Mint, and Banana.
fromDevelopmentDatabaseActionCannotUndon: from the development database. This action cannot be undone. You can re-import from Conductor afterwards.
fromDiskLlHaveDownloadAgain: ) from disk. You'll have to download it again to use it.
gemma412bNowAvailableLocal: Gemma 4 12B is now available in the Local LLM installer.
generateQrCodeThenScanPhone: Generate a QR code, then scan it with your phone's camera.
gitHeaderNowShowsWhenPr: The Git header now shows when PR checks are still running or GitHub is blocking a merge.
githubChecksHaveNotPassedYet: GitHub checks have not passed yet. Merge anyway and bypass them?
helmorCliSkillsLookHealthy: Helmor CLI and skills look healthy.
helmorCliSkillsUpDateVersion: Helmor CLI and skills are up to date with {version}.
helmorComponentsUpDate: Helmor components are up to date
helmorInstallingCliSkillsBackgroundSo: Helmor is installing the CLI and skills in the background so it can split work, run agents, call tools, and carry context across your workspaces.
helmorNowSupportsEnglishSimplifiedChines: Helmor now supports English and Simplified Chinese, with language pickers in Settings and onboarding.
helmorStillPreparingWorkspaceMessagingWi: Helmor is still preparing this workspace. Messaging will unlock automatically when setup finishes.
helmorUsesLocalLoginSessionsCan: Helmor uses your local login sessions. You can log in now, or continue and log in later.
importWorkspacesFromLocalConductorInstal: Import workspaces from a local Conductor installation
inboxComingSoonLinear1: Pull in issues, specs, labels, and priorities.
inboxComingSoonLinear2: Start workspaces directly from planned tasks.
inboxComingSoonLinear3: Keep implementation context tied to product intent.
inboxComingSoonMobile1: Send tasks, links, and screenshots from your phone.
inboxComingSoonMobile2: Keep lightweight review and triage flows in sync.
inboxComingSoonMobile3: Hand off mobile-captured context to desktop agents.
inboxComingSoonSlack1: Capture threads, decisions, and follow-up requests.
inboxComingSoonSlack2: Convert discussions into actionable workspace prompts.
inboxComingSoonSlack3: Preserve source context without copying long chat history.
inboxMentionsUnreadDmsAppear: Mentions and unread DMs will appear here.
inboxNoSignedInSlackWorkspaces: No signed-in Slack workspaces were found in your desktop app.
inspectorSelectDefaultEditorFirst: Select a default editor before opening files.
installSkillsSoHelmorCanHelp: Install skills so Helmor can help with more workflows across every workspace.
largePastesNowStayTagsAfter: Large pastes now stay as tags after sending — hover one to preview its full content.
latestUpdateHasBeenDownloadedReady: The latest update has been downloaded and is ready to install.
lightCleanupHandoffBeforeArchiving: Light cleanup or handoff before archiving.
linkExtraDirectoriesWorkspace: Link extra directories to this workspace
localLlmLandsVeryExperimentalPreview: Local LLM lands as a very experimental preview — it powers session title and branch name generation for now. More features coming soon.
localLlmScansEnabledSourcesCreates: The local LLM scans your enabled sources and creates AI-prepared workspaces for actionable items.
localRepositoryStaysExactlyBranchFiles: Your local repository stays exactly as it is — branch and files untouched.
longMessagesNowCollapse20Lines: Long messages now collapse to 20 lines — Show more expands them in place without losing your spot.
macosClosingWindowCmdShiftW: On macOS, closing the window (or Cmd+Shift+W) now keeps Helmor running in the Dock instead of quitting — click the Dock icon to bring it back. Cmd+Q still quits.
majorPerformanceImprovementsAcrossApp: ⚡ Major performance improvements across the app.
managedByHelmorJsonEditFile: Managed by helmor.json — edit the file to add or change
markOnboardingIncompleteSoAppearsNext: Mark onboarding as incomplete so it appears the next time Helmor starts.
miscBranchNameCannotStartWith: Branch name cannot start with "/", "." or "-".
miscBranchNameInvalidCharacter: Branch name contains an invalid character.
miscClaudeSignIn: Sign in to Claude Code to use Anthropic models in Helmor.
miscClaudeSignedInReady: Signed in and ready to run in local workspaces.
miscCodexSignIn: Sign in to Codex or configure a Codex API-key provider to use Codex models in Helmor.
miscCodexSignedInReady: Signed in and ready to run OpenAI models in Helmor.
miscCodexUsingProvider: Using {provider} from Codex config with its API key environment variable.
miscCouldNotMoveToWorktree: Could not move workspace into a new worktree.
miscCursorAddApiKey: Add a Cursor API key to use Cursor models in Helmor.
miscCursorApiKeySavedReady: API key saved and ready to run Cursor models in Helmor.
miscDescribeWhatYouWantToBuild: Describe what you want to build
miscEditorFileOutsideWorkspace: Only files inside the current workspace can be opened in the in-app editor.
miscEditorRootPathRequired: Open a workspace with a resolved root path before using the in-app editor.
miscFinishCliAuthClickSetUpAgain: Finish {provider} CLI auth, then click Set up again.
miscKimiSignIn: Sign in with `kimi login` to use Kimi models in Helmor.
miscKimiSignedInReady: Signed in and ready to run Kimi models in Helmor.
miscNewTerminalMessagesWontSyncBack: New terminal messages won't sync back here.
miscOpenWorkspaceBeforeInserting: Open a workspace before inserting content into the composer.
miscOpencodeConnectedReady: Connected and ready to run OpenCode models in Helmor.
miscOpencodeSignIn: Sign in with `opencode auth login` to use OpenCode models in Helmor.
miscSetupFailedWorkFineWithoutIt: Something went wrong — don't worry, Helmor will work fine without it.
miscTerminalSentAsChat: Couldn't open a terminal — sent as a chat message instead.
miscUnableToPullTargetUpdates: Unable to pull target branch updates.
namedCommandsLlPickFromInspector: Named commands you'll pick from the Inspector's Run dropdown.
narrowWindowsSidebarsNowPeekFrom: On narrow windows, the sidebars now peek in from the edges so the workspace stays full width.
navBranchNoLongerExistsSwitchTarget: Branch "{currentBranch}" no longer exists on {remote}. Switch target to "{suggestedBranch}"?
navBranchTakenRestoredOn: Branch "{original}" was already taken. Restored on "{actual}" instead.
navRepositoryAlreadyAddedOpenedStart: Repository already added — opened the start page so you can spin up a workspace.
navRestoredFromTargetBranchDetail: No archive commit was available, so the workspace was restored from "{targetBranch}".
navUnableFindWorkspaceCache: Unable to find workspace in the sidebar cache.
navUnableMarkWorkspaceUnread: Unable to mark workspace as unread.
navUnableResolveRepositoryForCreation: Unable to resolve repository for workspace creation.
newChatsCanNowInjectSelected: New chats can now inject selected previous sessions as context, so agents can continue work without pasting full transcripts.
newTerminalModeRunPromptAgent: New: Terminal Mode — run your prompt in the agent's own terminal UI (⌘⇧T).
noArchivedWorkspacesCleanUp: No archived workspaces to clean up
noCachedModelsYetClickRefresh: No cached models yet — click Refresh.
noChangesBranchYet: No changes on this branch yet.
noModelSelectedPickOneFrom: No model selected. Pick one from the Models dropdown below to start — including Custom if you already have a GGUF on disk.
noModelsReturnedByEndpoint: No models returned by the endpoint.
noModelsYetAddModelIds: No models yet — add the model ids your endpoint serves.
noWorkflowsConversationYetTheyAppear: No workflows in this conversation yet. They appear here when the agent runs a dynamic workflow.
olderCopyExistsInstallPath: An older copy exists at the install path.
onboardingWillShownNextLaunch: Onboarding will be shown on the next launch.
oneMoreComponentsNeedAttention: One or more components need attention.
onlyContinueIfTrustMcpServer: Only continue if you trust this MCP server and understand why it needs an external URL.
onlyIncludeKindSelectedRepositoryLabels: Only include {kind} with selected repository labels.
onlyLetOneWorkspaceRunScript: Only let one workspace run this script at a time. Starting a new run stops any other run in this repository — useful when the script binds a fixed port.
openDevServerNoUrlDetected: Open dev server (no URL detected yet)
openHelmorFromPhoneAnyBrowser: Open Helmor from your phone or any browser — pair a device once, then drive your desktop's workspaces and agents from a stable URL.
openQuickTaskPanelFromAnywhere: Open the quick task panel from anywhere.
openRequestedUrlContinue: Open the requested URL to continue.
opencodeNowBuiltCodingAgentStart: OpenCode is now a built-in coding agent — start a session and pick from any model it can reach, then connect your own providers in Settings.
optionalCleanupCommandRunWhenClick: Optional cleanup command run when you click Stop. Useful for scripts that manage external resources (docker compose down, supabase stop). Same env + cwd as the main command.
panelUnableShowImageFinder: Unable to show image in Finder
permanentlyDeleteAllCountArchivedWorkspa: Permanently delete all {count} archived {workspaceLabel}, including their sessions and chat history.
permanentlyRemoveRepositoryAllItsWorkspa: Permanently remove this repository and all its workspaces, sessions, and messages.
phoneConnectsFixedAddressSurvivesDesktop: Your phone connects at a fixed address that survives desktop restarts.
pickFolderThenWeLlWire: Pick a folder, then we'll wire it up.
pickJustChatStartPageOpen: Pick "Just Chat" on the start page to open a workspace without binding it to a repo.
pickWhichItemsEachConnectedAccount: Pick which items each connected account contributes to Contexts.
pickWhichModelsAppearComposerS: Pick which models appear in the composer's picker.
playSoundWhenDesktopNotificationFires: Play a sound when a desktop notification fires
plusBatchPerformanceFixesAcrossApp: Plus a batch of performance fixes across the app.
powersSessionTitleBranchNameGeneration: Powers session title / branch name generation and Smart Triage — both run entirely on your device.
prefixAddedBranchNamesWhenCreating: Prefix added to branch names when creating new workspaces in this repo.
pressArrowupArrowdownComposerStepThrough: Press ArrowUp / ArrowDown in the composer to step through previously-sent prompts for the current session — like bash or zsh.
previewCopyCurrentSessionImage: Preview and copy the current session as an image.
proposedTasksNowShowSourceBadge: Proposed tasks now show a source badge (GitHub, GitLab, Slack, or Lark) on their avatar, so you can see where each one came from at a glance.
providerNotEnabledFirstGithubFocused: This provider is not enabled in the first GitHub-focused inbox release.
question: Question
queueFollowUpsWhileAgentRuns: Queue follow-ups while the agent runs or steer the current run.
queuedMessagesNowHaveEditButton: Queued messages now have an Edit button — click it to pull a queued message back into the composer for revision, leaving the rest of the queue in place.
quickLinkChangesWhenRestartSign: The quick link changes when you restart. Sign in to Cloudflare for a permanent address.
quickPanelPressSpaceAnywhereSpin: Quick panel: press ⇧⌥Space anywhere to spin up a task in a small floating window — pick a repo, send the prompt, and keep chatting without opening Helmor. Hotkey configurable in Settings → Shortcuts.
reReadingConfigRestartsNameWill: Re-reading your config restarts {name} and will stop 1 running chat.
reReadingConfigRestartsNameWill2: Re-reading your config restarts {name} and will stop {count} running chats.
reasoningEffortOnlyIfModelSupports: Reasoning (effort) — only if the model supports it
repoLevelBuiltPromptsUsedBy: Repo-level built-in prompts used by Helmor actions and new chats.
routesAllProviderTrafficClaudeCode: Routes all provider traffic — Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, MiMo Code, and Cursor.
routesAllProviderTrafficClaudeCode2: Routes all provider traffic — Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Cursor.
runScriptOutputWillAppearHere: Run script output will appear here after running.
runTestsDevelopmentServerTestChanges: Run tests or a development server to test changes in this workspace.
runsWhenWorkspaceArchived: Runs when a workspace is archived
scanPhoneSCameraCodeCarries: Scan with your phone's camera. The code carries a one-time device token — pair once and the phone reconnects on its own.
scanQrCodeDeviceOpenPairing: Scan the QR code with this device, or open the pairing link in this browser.
searchCommandRun: Search for a command to run...
selectWhereRunTask: Select where to run the task
sendHelmorFeedbackRightFromApp: Send Helmor feedback right from the app — file a GitHub issue or hit "Quick fix" to open a workspace with the feedback as the first prompt.
sendStartTerminalMode: Send to start in Terminal mode
sessionDoesNotHaveAnyMessages: This session does not have any messages yet.
setByWorkspaceSHelmorJson: Set by this workspace's helmor.json — edit it there.
setCompletionConditionClaudeWorkToward: Set a completion condition for Claude to work toward
setNewObjectiveStartNow: Set the new objective and start it now
setPersistentGoalCodexPursuesTurn: Set a persistent goal Codex pursues turn-after-turn until done or paused
settingUpRepositoriesCopyingData: Setting up repositories and copying data...
settingsAddEndpointProviderTypeBaseUrlKe: Add an endpoint (provider type + base URL + key), then fetch its models. Saved to ~/.kimi-code/config.toml.
settingsHandOffMobileCapturedContextDesk: Hand off mobile-captured context to desktop agents.
settingsKeepImplementationContextTiedPro: Keep implementation context tied to product intent.
settingsKeepLightweightReviewTriageFlows: Keep lightweight review and triage flows in sync.
settingsPickWhichKimiModelsAppearCompose: Pick which Kimi models appear in the composer's picker.
settingsPullInIssuesSpecsLabelsPrioritie: Pull in issues, specs, labels, and priorities.
settingsRemoveModelFromDisk: This will remove the model from disk.
settingsSendTasksLinksScreenshotsFromPho: Send tasks, links, and screenshots from your phone.
settingsSignInToKimiEvenCustom: Sign in to Kimi to use it — even custom providers require login. Use the “Log in” button above.
settingsStartWorkspacesDirectlyFromPlann: Start workspaces directly from planned tasks.
settingsWorkspacesTargetBranchNotRemote: {count} workspaces target a branch not on this remote. Update them via the header branch picker.
setupScriptOutputWillAppearHere: Setup script output will appear here after running setup.
showAccountRateLimitsBesideComposer: Show account rate limits beside the composer.
showSystemNotificationsWhenSessionsCompl: Show system notifications when sessions complete or need input
sidebarNowHasViewControlsFiltering: The sidebar now has view controls for filtering by repository, changing grouping, and choosing sort order.
signClaudeCodeCodexThenRe: Sign in to Claude Code or Codex, then re-check.
sizeUsedChatMessageBodies: Size used for chat message bodies
sizedFitHardwareLeave: ) is sized to fit your hardware — leave it as is.
slackDesktopImportAvailableMacosWindows: Slack desktop import is available on macOS. Windows support is not wired up yet.
slackGithubGitlabContextDetailPanels: Slack, GitHub, and GitLab context detail panels now refresh automatically when you open them or refocus Helmor, and there's a manual refresh button in the toolbar.
slackNowContextSourceConnectWorkspaces: Slack is now a Context source — connect your workspaces and the agent can read threads (with images) the same way you do.
smartTriageLetLocalLlmScan: Smart Triage: let the local LLM scan Slack / Lark / GitHub / GitLab and pre-fill AI workspaces for actionable items.
smartTriageNowReasonsMoreDeeply: Smart Triage now reasons more deeply before suggesting tasks, so its proposed tasks are more accurate.
smartTriageNowSurfacesOnlyItems: Smart triage now surfaces only items that actually involve you (assigned, review-requested, @-mentioned, or your own work) and automatically archives proposed tasks once their pull request or issue is merged or closed — so the list stays relevant and cleans itself up.
splitFeatureIntoThreeWorkspacesDb: Split this feature into three workspaces — DB migration, backend handlers, and frontend wiring — so I can pair on each in parallel.
spunUpThreeWorkspacesSwitchBetween: Spun up three workspaces — switch between them in the sidebar to keep each lane moving.
startLocalProjectPullRemoteRepository: Start with a local project, or pull a remote repository from GitHub. You can add more than one before entering Helmor.
startWorkingTriageProposal: Start working on this triage proposal
stopOtherRunsRepositoryWhenStarting: Stop other runs in this repository when starting a new run
surfaceKindOpenedAssigned: Surface {kind} you opened or are assigned to.
surfaceKindReAssignedHaveOpened: Surface {kind} you're assigned to or have opened.
surfaceKindReposHaveAccess: Surface {kind} in repos you have access to.
syncedLocalGhGlabCli: Synced with your local gh / glab CLI.
tellTriageAgentWhatFocusPlain: Tell the triage agent what to focus on, in plain language.
there1TaskProgressQuittingNow: There is 1 task in progress. Quitting now will cancel it.
thereCountTasksProgressQuittingNow: There are {count} tasks in progress. Quitting now will cancel them.
thinkingBlocksEmptyServerSkipsStreaming: thinking blocks are empty. The server skips streaming thinking tokens, so the final text streams sooner. Reduces latency, not cost.
tickFiresRightAfterEachFetch: — a tick fires right after each fetch (every 5 minutes). Overlapping ticks are skipped.
ticksOnlyRunWhenPressRun: — ticks only run when you press Run now.
toolNeedsApprovalBeforeCanRun: This tool needs your approval before it can run.
totalTokenBudgetInputGeneratedOutput: The total token budget for input + generated output combined. Bigger context lets you send longer prompts but uses more RAM and takes longer to start.
trackedUntrackedChangesCarriedOverInto: Tracked + untracked changes are carried over into the new worktree.
tweakIfWantSWhatAgent: Tweak this if you want — it's what the agent starts with.
typingWorkflowUltrathinkComposerNowHighl: Typing "workflow" or "ultrathink" in the composer now highlights the word to cue the matching mode.
unableInstallDownloadedUpdate: Unable to install the downloaded update.
unableReadHelmorComponentsStatus: Unable to read Helmor components status
unableStartReviewSurface: Unable to start the review surface.
updaterNotConfiguredBuild: Updater is not configured in this build.
urlsTerminalOutputNowClickableClick: URLs in terminal output are now clickable — ⌘+click a link in the Terminal, Run, or Setup panels to open it in your browser.
useCommandControlMHeaderResize: Use Command+Control+M or the header resize button to switch Helmor between desktop and mini window sizes.
useGitlabComSelfHostedGitlab: Use gitlab.com or your self-hosted GitLab domain.
useLightDarkMatchSystem: Use light, dark, or match your system
useOwnGgufFileSetPath: Use your own GGUF file. Set the path below.
veDownloadedYourselfCuratedModelsAbove: you've downloaded yourself. Curated models above take precedence — clear this field to switch back to the picker.
versionHasBeenDownloadedReadyInstall: {version} has been downloaded and is ready to install.
waitingPublicUrlComeUp: Waiting for the public URL to come up…
weLlForkUpstreamHelmorRepo: We'll fork the upstream Helmor repo into your GitHub account.
wePolishedInterfaceAcrossComposerTabs: 🎨 We polished the interface across the composer, tabs, shortcuts, and empty states.
whenWorkspaceSLinkedPrMr: When a workspace's linked PR/MR is merged, archive the workspace automatically.
whereHelmorPullsTriageCandidatesFrom: Where Helmor pulls triage candidates from. Incremental fetch every 5 minutes.
whereShouldWePushPullCreate: Where should we push, pull, and create PRs?
whetherDraftKindAppearFeed: Whether draft {kind} appear in the feed.
whichKindRelationshipProviderShouldUse: Which {kind} relationship {provider} should use by default.
willContinueFreshWorktreeNewAuto: will continue in a fresh worktree on a new auto-named branch.
willOpenIssueSlug: This will open an issue in {slug}.
willPermanentlyDeleteAllCountArchived: This will permanently delete all {count} archived {workspaceLabel}, including their sessions and chat history. This cannot be undone.
willPermanentlyDeleteAllWorkspacesSessio: This will permanently delete all workspaces, sessions, and messages associated with
willReuseLocalHelmorRepo: Will reuse your local Helmor repo.
workspacesCanNowArchiveThemselvesAutomat: Workspaces can now archive themselves automatically once their linked PR/MR is merged.
